directive.title: RFQ detail page with live data from /api/rfq/[id]

auditor.summary: The implementation is architecturally sound and satisfies most acceptance criteria. The critical issues are the use of `any` type in the API route (violating both TypeScript strict mode and the explicit 'no any' constraint) and the potentially incorrect import path for the Drizzle db instance. These issues will cause TypeScript compilation and ESLint failures. The financial accuracy chain is properly implemented with traceable numeric(14,4) → parseFloat → Intl.NumberFormat conversion. UUID validation prevents malformed DB queries. The RBAC TODO comments are correctly placed. Score is reduced due to the TypeScript/ESLint violations which are HIGH severity issues that must be fixed before the build can pass.

top_issues.description: Uses `catch (error: any)` which violates the 'no any types' constraint and will cause ESLint/TypeScript errors
Import path '@/lib/db' may not resolve correctly. The build spec says to import from the path established in AUTO-025/AUTO-026, but no such path is confirmed in the codebase
The InvalidUuidError class is defined but not exported, making it inaccessible to the API route for proper type checking
